description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), introduced in 2020 as a community-driven meme experiment, grew into a global phenomenon through viral culture and strong grassroots support. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031 second block time — ATC-20 SHIB overcomes Ethereum’s slow speed and high fees, giving SHIB holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas cost, AI contract capability, and full interoperability in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Shiba Inu
